text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I-I find this all a bit sudden. Currently, nothing
about this situation strikes me as particularly
"marvelous."

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why not?! The three of us are all together! Isn't
that super marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see... Us being here with each other is
noteworthy in your eyes. Well, I'm honored you
feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Mhm! And it'd be even more marvelous if we all
shouted out loud together. One more try—on
three!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Gah, I-I couldn't resist. But wait, I do feel oddly
refreshed... All right, Brian, you join in this time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What are you on about? ...I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No passing! From the diaphragm, with vigor!
Come on, come on!
